content: The 2012 Nobel Prize in Chemistry was awarded to Robert Lefkowitz and Brian Kobilka for their work on G-protein-coupled receptors, a large family of proteins that play a crucial role in cell signaling.
raw_content: The 2012 Nobel Prize in Chemistry was awarded to Robert Lefkowitz and Brian Kobilka for their work on G-protein-coupled receptors, a large family of proteins that play a crucial role in cell signaling.
